Pacific Crest Trail

my journey on the Pacific Crest Trail 2024

Starting on April 17th, I’ll start the biggest adventure of my life so far: I’ll attempt to thru-hike the Pacific Crest Trail. In other words, I’ll walk from Mexico to Canada.

Once I finish my adventure (either by completing it or not), I’ll update this page. In the meanwhile, you can follow this adventure on my Polarsteps!
